# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs')
        string(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'User for deployment')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/app', description: 'Deployment path on servers')
    }
    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',')
                    def artifactDir = "artifacts"
                    sh "mkdir -p ${artifactDir}"
                    
                    urls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/')[-1]
                        sh "curl -L -o ${artifactDir}/${fileName} ${url}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def artifactDir = "artifacts"
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        sh """
                            for file in ${artifactDir}/*; do
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no \$file ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/
                            done
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Validate Deployment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS.split(',')
                    def success = true
                    
                    servers.each { server ->
                        def result = sh(
                            script: "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server} 'ls -la ${params.DEPLOY_PATH}'",
                            returnStatus: true
                        )
                        if (result != 0) {
                            success = false
                        }
                    }
                    
                    if (!success) {
                        error "Deployment validation failed on one or more servers"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
